Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by crafting weapons for our soldiers!

We need more focuscrafter's scepters!
Take your skills into the field. Head to Pora Elinu and speak with Lenka. He'll see to your assignment.

Welcome to Pora Elinu!

Lots of work to do. Take this design. We need scepters. You craft.
